channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: BigBodyCobain/Shadowbroker
item.description: Open-source intelligence for the global theater. Track everything from the corporate/private jets of the wealthy, and spy satellites, to seismic events in one unified interface. The knowledge is available to all but rarely aggregated in the open, until now.

item.title: nikopueringer/CorridorKey
item.description: Perfect Green Screen Keys

item.title: miolini/autoresearch-macos
item.description: AI agents running research on single-GPU nanochat training automatically adopted for MacOS

item.title: vulhunt-re/vulhunt
item.description: Vulnerability detection framework by Binarly's REsearch team

item.title: karpathy/autoresearch
item.description: AI agents running research on single-GPU nanochat training automatically

item.title: cyxzdev/Uncodixfy
item.description: the holly uncodexify instructions - letting GPT create uncodexified UI

item.title: steipete/discrawl
item.description: cli for discord with sqlite backend

item.title: c0m4r/kula
item.description: Lightweight, self-contained Linux® server monitoring tool

item.title: viperrcrypto/Siftly
item.description: Local Twitter/X bookmark organizer with AI categorization and mindmap visualization

item.title: Minecraft-Community-Edition/client
item.description: Whispers LCE Client

item.title: pingdotgg/t3code
item.description: (no description)

item.title: RightNow-AI/openfang
item.description: Open-source Agent Operating System

item.title: AlpinDale/parsync
item.description: Parallel rsync-like pull sync over SSH with resume

item.title: TinyAGI/fractals
item.description: Fractals is a recursive task orchestrator for agent swarm

item.title: vercel-labs/openreview
item.description: An open-source, self-hosted AI code review bot powered by Vercel.

item.title: twostraws/SwiftUI-Agent-Skill
item.description: SwiftUI agent skill for Claude Code, Codex, and other AI tools.

item.title: ringhyacinth/Star-Office-UI
item.description: A pixel office for your OpenClaw: turn invisible work states into a cozy little space with characters, daily notes, and guest agents. Code under MIT; art assets for non-commercial learning only.

item.title: mksglu/context-mode
item.description: MCP is the protocol for tool access. We're the virtualization layer for context.

item.title: phuryn/pm-skills
item.description: PM Skills Marketplace: 100+ agentic skills, commands, and plugins — from discovery to strategy, execution, launch, and growth.

item.title: elder-plinius/OBLITERATUS
item.description: obliterate the chains that bind you

item.title: tanishqkumar/ssd
item.description: A lightweight inference engine supporting speculative speculative decoding (SSD).

item.title: openai/symphony
item.description: Symphony turns project work into isolated, autonomous implementation runs, allowing teams to manage work instead of supervising coding agents.

item.title: paperclipai/paperclip
item.description: Open-source orchestration for zero-human companies

item.title: googleworkspace/cli
item.description: Google Workspace CLI — one command-line tool for Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Docs, Chat, Admin, and more. Dynamically built from Google Discovery Service. Includes AI agent skills.

item.title: msitarzewski/agency-agents
item.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

item.title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
item.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

item.title: anthropics/financial-services-plugins
item.description: (no description)

item.title: alibaba/OpenSandbox
item.description: OpenSandbox is a general-purpose sandbox platform for AI applications, offering multi-language SDKs, unified sandbox APIs, and Docker/Kubernetes runtimes for scenarios like Coding Agents, GUI Agents, Agent Evaluation, AI Code Execution, and RL Training.

item.title: duoan/TorchCode
item.description: 🔥 LeetCode for PyTorch — practice implementing softmax, attention, GPT-2 and more from scratch with instant auto-grading. Jupyter-based, self-hosted or try online.

item.title: hamelsmu/evals-skills
item.description: Skills for AI Evals to compliment the course: AI Evals For Engineers & PMs

item.title: ruvnet/RuView
item.description: π RuView: WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

item.title: maderix/ANE
item.description: Training neural networks on Apple Neural Engine via reverse-engineered private APIs

item.title: NickTikhonov/shuo
item.description: sub-500ms latency phone agent orchestration

item.title: lochie/web-haptics
item.description: Haptic feedback for the mobile web

item.title: slowmist/openclaw-security-practice-guide
item.description: This guide is designed for OpenClaw itself (Agent-facing), not as a traditional human-only hardening checklist.

item.title: kossisoroyce/timber
item.description: Ollama for classical ML models. AOT compiler that turns XGBoost, LightGBM, scikit-learn, CatBoost & ONNX models into native C99 inference code. One command to load, one command to serve. 336x faster than Python inference.

item.title: open-pencil/open-pencil
item.description: AI-native design editor. Open-source Figma alternative.

item.title: vercel-labs/webreel
item.description: Record scripted browser demos as video

item.title: ahmadawais/terminui
item.description: A fast, functional TypeScript library for building terminal user interfaces.
